escalation.rationale: Active US-Israel war against Iran continues with Israeli ground operations in Lebanon and Iran's Strait of Hormuz blockade causing global oil crisis.

ticker_items: Israel launches limited ground assault in southern Lebanon against Hezbollah
Iran blocks Strait of Hormuz, oil prices surge 40-50%
US allies refuse Trump's request for Hormuz coalition support
Israeli strikes continue pounding Iran, three-week war plan announced

eastern_europe.description: North Korea fired about 10 ballistic missiles toward the eastern sea in show of force during US-South Korea exercises.

middle_east.description: US fighter jets struck military facility near Chabahar Free Trade Zone near Pakistan border.
Iranian drone hit fuel tank near Dubai airport causing fire and flight suspensions.
Israel launched fresh midnight strike on Dahiyeh targeting Hezbollah infrastructure.
US airstrikes pounded the western Iranian city of Hamadan as part of ongoing military campaign.
Israeli forces began limited targeted ground operations against Hezbollah strongholds in southern Lebanon.
Israeli forces launched limited ground operations against Hezbollah in southern Lebanon.
Israeli airstrikes pounded sites across Iran overnight as part of ongoing three-week war campaign.
Iranian drone attacks temporarily shut Dubai airport and hit key oil facility.
Iran targeted Bahrain with drone strikes in show of defiance.

russia.text: The EU has failed as a credible mediator in the Ukraine peace talks
russia.speaker: Sergey Lavrov
russia.title: Russian Foreign Minister

ukraine.text: The Druzhba pipeline will stay closed as Ukraine hopes to punish Slovakia for desiring peace between Kiev and Moscow
ukraine.speaker: Robert Fico
ukraine.title: Slovak PM

middle_east.text: Iran does not hesitate to confront aggressors
middle_east.speaker: Masoud Pezeshkian
middle_east.title: Iranian President

middle_east.text: The Pentagon has virtually unlimited stocks of ammunition allowing the military to continue operations against Iran for as long as required
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: It would be very bad for the future of NATO if allies don't help secure the critical waterway for global oil shipping
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Shiites won't return to south of Litani River
middle_east.speaker: Israel Katz
middle_east.title: Israeli Defense Minister

middle_east.text: We want to make sure they are as weak as possible
middle_east.speaker: Israeli military spokesperson
middle_east.title: IDF Spokesperson

observers.description: Germany ruled out naval participation in Strait of Hormuz escort mission despite Trump pressure on NATO allies. Berlin maintains defensive posture while avoiding direct involvement in maritime operations.

Macron bolsters military presence in Middle East calling effort strictly defensive while preparing for postwar talks. France positioning itself as mediator while maintaining regional military capability.
Starmer says UK working with allies on Strait of Hormuz plan after Trump call but insists UK won't be dragged into broader conflict. Britain balancing alliance obligations with domestic concerns.

EU leaders rejected military involvement in Strait of Hormuz operations despite Trump's demands. Foreign ministers are examining shifting focus of Red Sea naval mission but maintain this is 'not NATO's war'.
Qatar Airways announced limited flight operations starting March 18, indicating regional aviation disruption. Qatar maintains neutral stance while experiencing indirect conflict effects.
US has diverted South Korea's missile defense systems to support Iran war operations. This redeployment creates geopolitical ripple effects in East Asia amid North Korean missile tests.

Kenya's Foreign Minister met with Lavrov in Moscow, reaching agreement that Kenyans will cease enlisting in Russian military operations in Ukraine. This diplomatic shift affects over a thousand Kenyan fighters previously recruited for the conflict.

financial.notes: Global oil prices have surged dramatically due to Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, threatening recession concerns.

update_log.text: Israel launches limited ground operations against Hezbollah in southern Lebanon
Trump says allies are 'less than enthusiastic' about Hormuz coalition as requests go unanswered
Iranian drone strikes temporarily shut Dubai airport and hit UAE oil facilities
Israel announces plans for at least three more weeks of war as airstrikes continue pounding Iran
EU leaders formally reject military involvement in Strait of Hormuz operations
Israel announces limited ground operations in southern Lebanon against Hezbollah
Fresh US airstrikes reported on Hamadan as Iran war enters third week
Qatar Airways announces limited flight operations starting March 18
US officials predict Iran war will end within weeks despite Tehran claiming it can outlast enemies
Iranian drone strikes fuel tank near Dubai airport forcing temporary flight suspensions
US fighter jets strike military facility near Chabahar Free Trade Zone near Pakistan border
Israel launches fresh midnight strike on Beirut southern suburbs targeting Hezbollah infrastructure
